arguments.content: Fix for EmbedderIdentityUnknownWarning on mempalace_closets collection. The mempalace palace set-embedder command only sets the identity for the default mempalace_drawers collection. To fix it for closets, use python: from mempalace.palace import set_palace_embedder_identity; set_palace_embedder_identity(os.path.expanduser('~/.mempalace/palace'), model='minilm', collection_name='mempalace_closets', force=True)
